'''wazacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaning|loaning]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaning|loaning]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wazacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzæchæth|wæzæchæth]] || [[word:wæzæchæj|wæzæchæj]] || [[word:wæzæchæsh|wæzæchæsh]] || [[word:wæzæchæ|wæzæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazazachath|wazazachath]] || [[word:wazazachaj|wazazachaj]] || [[word:wazazachash|wazazachash]] || [[word:wazazacha|wazazacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazachath|wazachath]] || [[word:wazachaj|wazachaj]] || [[word:wazachash|wazachash]] || [[word:wazacha|wazacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazafchath|wazafchath]] || [[word:wazafchaj|wazafchaj]] || [[word:wazafchash|wazafchash]] || [[word:wazafchaf|wazafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazachatha|wazachatha]] || [[word:wazachaja|wazachaja]] || [[word:wazachasha|wazachasha]] || [[word:wazachaka|wazachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazachath|wazachath]] || [[word:wazachaj|wazachaj]] || [[word:wazachash|wazachash]] || [[word:wazacha|wazacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazachathal|wazachathal]] || [[word:wazachajal|wazachajal]] || [[word:wazachashal|wazachashal]] || [[word:wazachakal|wazachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazachathatha|wazachathatha]] || [[word:wazachajaja|wazachajaja]] || [[word:wazachashasha|wazachashasha]] || [[word:wazachaka|wazachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazachathan|wazachathan]] || [[word:wazachajan|wazachajan]] || [[word:wazachashan|wazachashan]] || [[word:wazachakan|wazachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazachathaoro|wazachathaoro]] || [[word:wazachajaoro|wazachajaoro]] || [[word:wazachashaoro|wazachashaoro]] || [[word:wazachakaoro|wazachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
